name: Anglesey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat the egg in a separate bowl.
3. Add the beaten egg to the butter and sugar mixture, mixing well.
4. Sift the self-raising flour and salt together into the mixture.
5. Fold the fruit into the batter until evenly distributed.
6. Gradually add milk to achieve a soft 'dropping' consistency.
7. Place the batter in a greased tin.
8. Bake in a moderately hot oven (375°F or Mark 5) for 45 minutes, or until done.
